title: 'One Piece: Heroines' Unveils Cast Pair, Promo
content:
The One Piece Red Stage event at AnimeJapan 2026 unveiled a cast pair and a promotional video for One Piece: Heroines anime on Saturday. The anime adapting Jun Esaka 's adventure fantasy light novel will premiere at 11.15 a.m. on July 5.

Voice actors Takehito Koyasu ( Jujutsu Kaisen ) and Maaya Sakamoto ( Enen no Shouboutai ) are joining the cast as Lubno and Miucca, respectively.

Haruka Kamatani ( Majo Minarai wo Sagashite ) is helming the anime, with Momoka Toyoda ( One Piece Fan Letter ) writing the script. Takashi Kojima ( Kimi to Nami ni Noretara ) is designing the characters.

Esaka penned the adventure fantasy light novel with illustration by Sayaka Suwa in One Piece Magazine from December 2019 to September 2023. Shueisha published the second and final volume in March 2024.

VIZ Media licensed the novel for English release in May 2024, and published the second volume in July 2025.

PV

title: 'Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo 3rd Season' Announces Additional Cast
content:
• The Tokyo MX Booth at AnimeJapan 2026 announced an additional cast pair for Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo 3rd Season ( The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You Season 3 ) on Saturday. The new season is scheduled to premiere in July 2026.

Voice actresses Kaori Ishihara ( Hige wo Soru. Soshite Joshikousei wo Hirou. ) and Ayana Taketatsu ( Youkoso Jitsuryoku Shijou Shugi no Kyoushitsu e ) are joining the cast as Chiyo Iin and Nadeshiko Yamato, respectively.

Produced by Bibury Animation Studios , the first season aired in 12 episodes in Fall 2023. The second season premiered in Winter 2025. Crunchyroll streamed the anime with subtitles and dubs in multiple languages.

Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo , also known as Hyakkano , adapts Rikito Nakamura and Yukiko Nozawa 's comedy harem manga , which they launched in Young Jump magazine in December 2019. Shueisha published the 25th volume on March 18. Hyakkano has a cumulative 2.2 million copies of its volumes in circulation.

Seven Seas Entertainment licensed the manga in English under its Ghost Ship imprint in July 2021. The 17th volume went on sale on March 17, with the 18th volume scheduled for a June 23 release.
author: MyAnimeList
